narrative: Iran peace hopes and weak China oil demand hammers crude prices, setting up a potential crude bid at the Tokyo open. EUR/USD closed Friday at 1.1527; ECB hold removes near-term downside risk but Fed-ECB differential caps upside. USD/JPY closed Friday at 160.29; any hawkish surprise from the next BoJ meeting would pressure USD/JPY from Friday's close. The bear steepener yield curve regime and elevated VIX suggest a CAUTION regime.
